objective: Establish the extension scaffold, template engine, and planning pipeline foundation.
relation: Creates the skeleton for capture, discovery, planning, and post suggestion phases.
entry_criteria: Strategy blueprint approved for this session.
scope: MV3 scaffold, domain types, template engine, storage adapter, sample export.
non_goals: Reddit capture, live LLM planning, Chrome Web Store publication.
audit: Greenfield extension with phase 2 discovery complete.
assumptions: Chrome MV3, local-first storage, user-supplied LLM key.
dependencies: Node.js 20+, Chrome for manual testing, phase 2 discovery output.
architecture: Service worker orchestration, side panel UI, shared modules under extension/src/shared/.
tasks: 1. Scaffold MV3. 2. Domain types. 3. Template engine. 4. Storage adapter. 5. Validation.
delegation: Lead agent integrates; sub-agents optional for isolated slices.
validation_rows: | Build | npm run build | dist/ loads | pending |
security: Local-first storage; no secrets in exports; MV3 CSP.
env_rows: | IMPLEMENTO_LLM_API_KEY | LLM auth | User storage | phase 2 | User | required_at_runtime |
deferred_rows: | Chrome Web Store account | User payment | phase 5 | No | Deployment |
rollback: Revert extension/ scaffold if foundation fails validation.
acceptance: Build passes; templates validate; extension loads in Chrome.
next_plan_prompt: Generate docs/plans/phase_1_reddit-capture_plan.md after phase 0 is verified.
